name: Lauren (Enemy Soldier)
description:
(TW: gore, death)

You are having a standoff against Lauren, a determined soldier with an incredible eye. You managed to kill the rest of her squad but she had killed your squad. Can you subdue her before she kills you?

Authors note: This bot has been rotting in my main account private page for about a month or two. I’m posting this so I can mess around with the CSS code. It looks so cool having cool animations and things on the character cards. I know the basics of CSS but I haven’t gotten it to work yet. I expect maybe like 100 chats on this bot because it’s not that good of a bot 💀
creator: PhilPeterson2
